STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-27-1994, CASE ORDERED TO ARBITRATION ON MAR-27-1995 PURSUANT TO CCP 1141.11(D) APPEARANCE ON DEC. 27, 1994 NOT REQUIRED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALLAH, ANGELA MURRAY, MAURICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITEMOORE, CAVSLY LUXOR CAB CO. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, PRINCIPAL - $2500.00 EACH, I.E. $2500.00 FOR ANGELA MALLAH & $2500.00 FOR MAURICE MURRAY. STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF. ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR
